rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, December 14, 2015, Line 3 ( Part 1 of 2). rulings.Case Title: MARIA LOW VS. NATHAN JAUVTIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Taxing Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, December 14, 2015, Line 5. PLAINTIFF MARIA LOW Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Taxing Costs is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is timely per CRC 3.1700(b). (memorandum of Costs filed and served by mail on September 28, 2015; Motion filed and served on October 14, 2015). Motion is granted as to the court reporter fees. Defendant fails to indicate which statue "established" the fees that Defendant is seeking ot recover. Motion is granted as to the expert fees as they are disallowed by CCP 1033.5(b)(1) and 42 U.S. Code 7604(d) is not applicable. Motion is otherwise DENIED. =(501/REQ)
